---
title: '1984'
author: George Orwell
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★★★
rating: 5
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# 1984
Classic dystopian novel, I remember reading it and i rmb quite enjoying it but i rmb it could be quite hard to follow at times and at some points idk what the author included some points for

## Reading Journey

- 2025-10-31: Finished
